reviews.review_title: One of my all time favorites
reviews.review_description: I just noticed I've never left a review for this. I've owned it for probably 2 years and have replayed it several times. It never gets old. The story is awesome, there is so much to do. It would be amazing if they made a sequel or something else like it. Aside from the main story, there are tons of side activities. Mini games. You play all those and there are things to collect. It really is a great game. It plays flawlessly. No glitches. Makes me want to play it again.
The story is good the action is good the voice acting is good just good game 11/10

Listen, if you want a proper VR Spider-Man game, you may be out of luck however, this gets the job done for now. 

I’ve tried Spider-Lair and Untangled which both let me down in the Spider-Man experience side of things. The controls of those games just don’t feel right and the tutorials are a let down. This game changes all of that.

While it may not be perfect I’m able to look past the issues and truly enjoy this game. Yes, I have experienced glitches on 3 different occasions so far and yes, I’ve had a problem trying to turn building highlighting off but this game still gets a good review from me.

The swinging is unmatched, going at speeds no other Swinging game has done so far. The guns feel good to use and the puzzles are challenging, yet fun!

I give this game a 8.5/10

Id love any form of customization, a bigger city to explore, more gun variety, and maybe a few more gadgets.

reviews.review_title: Absolutely amazing! This is a real gem!!
reviews.review_description:
This game has kept me sucked into for hours on end multiple times!! The story is great, the battles are awesome, and moving around the city is incredible.
The feeling you get from it is just something else! :)
I barely play games, but I read a few people struggled to pick up the grapples etc in reviews.
…I’m not sure how. It’s easy enough. 
Some of the battles are quite challenging,
But in a really good way, not an annoying one!
The hacking billboards is a challenge at times too.
I still haven’t completely finished the game yet, 
or fully upgraded everything you earn throughout the game, im sure by that point it will be even better to just manoeuvre around the city for fun.
I got this for £3.99 in the sale, but surprisingly, 
I actually feel this is worth the £15 it’s at now.
If you’re thinking about getting this, do it!!
It will probably be more fun than most others!

reviews.review_title: One of the BEST quest games right now
reviews.review_description: This game is awesome. Your like spider-man with guns can you take down drones and giant robots! The game is realistic and doesn’t take much space. The only bad thing I could say about this game is that the swinging takes a bit to get used to but other than that it’s really good! 10/10

Rarely has a game brought me so much joy and excitement. I feel this developer understands what games are meant for: FUN. I pretty much played Resist straight through and enjoyed every second of it. Can't wait for part 2!!!! 🤗

reviews.review_title: One of the best on here!
reviews.review_description: It's Spider-Man with guns!  Great gameplay and amazing traversal.  Cannot recommend enough.

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR studios right now
reviews.review_description:
Bought Resist a long time ago but never played it; remembered I had it after finishing Into Black (another amazing game by the same devs) and jumped in. By now the devs had fully polished the game and added a Quest 3 graphics update so turned out wait was worth it! Love that you get a full voice acted story mode, tons of customizable gameplay options (and an immersive tutorial to figure out which ones suit you best) and that the devs aren’t scared of aggressive movement.


At the inception of PCVR some of the devs seemed to have unlocked the key to a great VR game - immersive graphics, voice acting, story mode and then some way someone could technically play the game nearly infinitely if they wanted to.  And thus dev team seems to be one of the few (along with Camilla’s) carrying that forward.  Only makes sense since they were the devs of the first VR game I ever bought, gun club VR, so they have been in it for a long time.

tLdR: if you find yourself complaining about too many “monks games and too many “tech demos” on the Quest store, this game is a MUST BUY!

I had so much fun learning and really getting the feel for this game. I love the concept and the storyline was fantastic. The features and upgrades added a lot more interesting elements to combat and travel throughout the map. I also really enjoyed the enemies, from the drones circling around you, to the giant mechs crawling around the cityscape. Overall it was a phenomenal experience, and I cannot wait to play the story mode over and over again.

My experience with this one was a bit of a rollercoaster. First impressions were great. Lovely looking cityscape reminiscent of Mirror's Edge had me hooked and the intro section set me up for something fun. Then I just couldn't enjoy the tutorial on traversing the city using the grapple system. It was on one hand smooth and on the other hand awkward to deal with for certain moves. 

Ultimately I started to get more used to swinging around and could traverse the city pretty well but precision wasn't really attainable.

Getting into the story introduced me to the mixture of mini games that make up the various interactions around the city and I was really growing to enjoy it. Being able to choose which to play meant sticking to the events I could enjoy.

Then came the cardinal sin of not only introducing timed events, an absolute nightmare for a game with controls like this, but forcing the player to take part in a timed marathon of mixed events *as a story requirement*. Blocking story progression behind an extremely irritating and difficult event is an instant put off. One part of the event in particular being especially frustrating as it involved trying to make it through a low level area on the grapples immediately after being made to jump from a high roof, making it nigh on impossible to obtain an appropriate grappling point at the correct height, especially with a ridiculously small window of time to achieve it.

It soon became too irritating to repeatedly be screwed over on this ridiculous requirement, any sense of fun or reward was gone, deletion soon followed.

Never lock your story behind a timed event, especially one that requires a level of control likely to be unobtainable early in the game, and this goes tenfold for a VR game with full motion.

Resist is one of the most immersive and thrilling experiences I’ve had in virtual reality. Swinging through the city feels incredible — like freedom, adrenaline, and flow all at once. The reflections on puddles, windows, buildings, the atmosphere, the ocean… everything comes together beautifully, especially with the new Quest 3 enhancements, which really take the visuals to the next level.

The voice acting is also outstanding — genuinely emotional and believable, on par with a Hollywood production.

On top of that, the team behind the game is unbelievably responsive and kind. They’ve made me feel heard and valued, and their updates and improvements just keep making the experience better and better.

This is more than just a game — it’s a passionate, well-crafted world that keeps growing. I’m genuinely grateful for it.
Some￼ of the most fun I’ve ever had on VR, extremely great asking price. I’ve bought some expensive VR games and they aren’t nearly as fun.. BIG DUBS^_^

I love this game so much. I've played it thru multiple times. And I sometimes go in and just raise the threat level so I can just shoot drones and the big robots. But - the game is actually quite glitchy. I've fallen thru buildings and thru the actual ground. The big robots sometimes walk thru the buildings. I've even had it glitch while I was hacking a billboard. If those issues were resolved, I would say this is the best game I've ever played on VR. Despite its flaws, I still love it tho. :)

Only about a half hour in and this game is so much fun. Love the ability to swing around town at high speeds, the town also looks very realistic. The plotline is unique and fun as well. Only complaint I would have is that I wish you could interact with the npc and the npc cars

The Binary Mill just doesn’t miss,they are truly a top tier studio. I mad at myself for not playing this sooner. You have an entire open city to swing around in like Spider-Man with guns. This game has some of the best VR mechanics I’ve ever seen. The feeling of swinging around from building to building is amazing. Quickly swinging around a building to get a good vantage point on drones is next level. I’ve never played a game from The Binary Mill that wasn’t a mind blowing experience. From here on out,anything this studio releases is an instant buy. For anyone who hasn’t played Into Black yet,go buy it ASAP. It is amazing too. I highly recommend this game and anything from The Binary Mill. If you’re reading this,just buy it. You will not be disappointed

Great story if you are no problems with VR playing this i a great place to be also many options to modify your flying from looking to to just use the joystick but i like it with the looking more realistic to jump fly around and defending from heayy mech tripods.
also many POI todo sometimes its better to go for this first so you can have more XP to level up your weapons and power of your jetpack you also can use to hover around to go helping the city from the ruling regime.

One of the best games on the quest 
If you want to feel like Spiderman ,then just buy this awesome game

The game progress is not able to transfer automatically ( cloud save) or manually from my Quest 2 to Quest 3. As a result, I would need to replay everything again. Why do you do this to your customer?😞

reviews.review_title: Amazing but one big bug in level
reviews.review_description: Unfortunately with the mission where you have to get that big gun from the Tripod, it has a major bug. When you kill it and need to grapple it, it dissapears and you sink right through the floor. You can’t even hold on to buildings. Seems like every object lost its barrier. I can’t continue the rest of the game because of this problem. Please solve this. Certainly would like my money back if it doesn’t get solved. This was on the Quest 3.

developer_response.body: Hi PapaNelis - sorry to hear about your issue here. Did you try selecting 'restart from checkpoint' in the menu to see if this resolves the issue? If not, please reach out to us directly at support@thebinarymill.com and we'll be sure to get you swinging again in no time.

reviews.review_description: I bought this to play on pcvr via oculus app. There are no hands or pointers when it starts. In game is some sort of stuttering mess. You can't move your head without the entire screen wobbling uncontrollably. Sickness inducing. It's the only pcvr game I've played that does this.
it hurts my head

I love this game but it is very many bugs such as falling through The map and not be able to do tasks.
Now i am stuck. I tried to Get a refund but Oculus didnt accept. I tried to restart, but it didnt work. Can i Get refund?
I hate this game so much and I don’t know how to refund and I am so mad

The game is fun but it is soo Glitchy I'm either 2x the height I should be or half the height I should be and whenever I restart from last save like the game says you should if you have issues nothing is fixed and I can't refund it

developer_response.body: Hey Floppa, we've not had reports of a glitch like this before, could you email us at support@thebinarymill.com so we can try to get to the bottom of it for you?

reviews.review_title: What Happened? I Open To Nothing!
reviews.review_description:
Where is the game? I thought I was playing the game. The game ended no sooner then I started playing it; and it just seemed not to do anything else when I open the game up except request a challenge or task of me. 
     No robots or anything comes up at me. I open up the game and I have to request from the game to play it by finding a tower to open up POI for points on upgrades for nothing that is happening. 

      I have no idea what happened to the game and I am lost. The fact that I found a dead-end loop of nothing in this game is disturbing. Who actually plays the game? You never saw this? I open your game to a loop that is supposed to be the campaign of the game which is dead. Must I restart the game and what would I do to avoid being here again. I am 60 years old. I am not passing any of those challenges. How do I play the game. Some of the challenges are impossible like the "Hopper". I don't like this game. One star for the concept which is not new at all.

developer_response.body: Hi Levi, it sounds like you might be stuck on a mission 7. If you could contact us at support@thebinarymill.com I'm sure we can help you progress.

reviews.review_description:
The left hand/controller in VR was stuck in the air and unable to do anything. My controllers work perfect for other games. On top of that, I was instantly sick the moment it started, unlike other games.

I didn’t even get to play 5 minutes. I’d like a refund please

This game has some of the most fun movement and combat mechanics I have seen in VR, the voice acting is pretty good and I'm glad it has a myriad of comfort settings as to prevent motion sickness and ease the playing experience, all in all for the price it's an 11/10

This game is way to glitchy with their swinging, I have never got motion sick playing a game until I played this piece of crap, nobody in the reviews talk about how you throw up within minutes of gameplay because of the constant spinning you around for no reason, I PAYED GOOD MONEY FOR THIS GAME ONLY TO THROW UP EVERY TIME I PLAY IT

developer_response.body: Hey Niko, sorry to hear you're having motion sickness issues. We included a lot of different options to try an combat this, if you haven't checked them out in the options menu I'd highly recommend it. If spinning is your primary issue I'd recommend going to the 'experimental' tab and trying the detached camera mode. You can also change what happens when you hit a wall/building, to prevent further spinning. Hope this helps!

reviews.review_title: Not for new VR users...but awesome :D
reviews.review_description:
I realy Love this Game, but I am immune to Motion-sicknes.
The swinging System isn't perfekt at the beginning but aus soon as you get the Jetpack it is.
The story seems good, too.
I Like it much much more than swarm.

The graphics are awesome, how the City apears in the Charakters mind in the Tutorial was Just beautiful.

I Just played the first few Missions but I am pretty shure I found one of my News favourite Games.

Thank you very much for the great and awesome Work.

reviews.review_title: Great game  Maybe too many puzzles
reviews.review_description:
Needed more action

Felt forced to reach 50% by completing repetitive and excessive tasks

That’s where I disconnected

This was my very first VR experience. I have to say, it did not disappoint in the slightest. The movement is fluid, the minigames are challenging, the characters are hilarious, and the story was captivating. If the studio that made this game makes another, I'll definitely be buying it immediately!

I don't get the positive reviews at all, I bought this because I was dumb and trusted a YouTube review.  The mechanics of this game are awful, locomotion is the most frustrating terrible thing I've ever experienced in a game, and it's probably the least amount of content I've seen in a VR game. I really tried to give this a chance because of all the positive buzz but I have on multiple occasions quit in the middle of playing because trying to get around in the game is so frustratingly terrible. Which was probably good because if not, I probably would've finished the whole game in one session. If you can get this game for 5 bucks it might be worth playing around with for a little while.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear the default swinging didn't click for you. Just wondering if you had a chance to try the 'detached' camera control option in the experimental menu? This has proven to be a better solution for some. Regardless, thanks for giving Resist a try and no hard feelings on refunding! Cheers.

reviews.review_description: This game was one of the first I purchased for my new oculus, because of its high rating. All I can say is so far, it's lived up to its rating! I found the tutorials super easy to follow and getting used to the grappling was easy as well. Recommend!!

Tried to get refund on game because it causes horrible motion sicknees and makes you dizzy... Played for 1/2hr, and they will not refund the purchase.  I do not get motion sickness with any other games, so for the short period it was played, I should be able to get a refund.

developer_response.body: Not sure what has happened here -- you can obtain a refund if you purchased it within two weeks or/and have played it for less than 2 hours. While we don't/can't handle refund directly, Oculus will honor them if you meet the above criteria.

reviews.review_description: I love resist , it’s an awesome challenge and a great game in VR . What the VR community reply want us a full on Spider-Man . Your swinging gameplay is awesome so it would be really fun to include it a little more. The game is great.

reviews.review_title: So awful. AVOID DO NOT BUY!!!
reviews.review_description: I thought the side quests were optional?! I just started playing and I am forced to do these do challenges to proceed. Swinging through hoops and jumping on certain points within a time limit. Also the challenges are impossible to do, maybe my game is just bugged but they are not possible. I bought this game to free roam and fight robots. Devs I want a good answer right now about why you falsely advertised this. This is so garbage these developers they don’t deserve anyones money. About to refund

developer_response.body: We're planning to add difficulty levels in a future update so perhaps that will help you out. Having said that, maybe Resist isn't the game for you so no hard feelings on a refund -- that's what the feature is there for :)

reviews.review_description: Fantastic game.  Great tutorial within the game.  Solid title. Can't wait to see whats next!!

reviews.review_title: The worst tutorial i have ever seen
reviews.review_description: In part of the tutorial i literally had to walk instead of swing because if i turned 9.5 mm to the left i had to restart that section
Ready to swing?

reviews.review_title: I've seen better games on Roblox
reviews.review_description:
Bruh... What are these reviews about this game being anything above a 1/5. let's think about this game for just a minute:

1. I am forced to play a female character throughout the story who I CANT ABSOLUTELY RELATE AT ALL, in fact the cheesey remarks about how MUCH THIS FEMALE CHARACTER LOVES HER FRIEND IS SO UNRELATABLE I kinda just made up my own story... as I have never seen them or even did anything with them. WHY DOES MY CHARACTER ACT LIKE SHE CARES LMFAO, please for the love of every indie game just make a mute button or give me a quiet male character

2. The city border are literally next to the ocean, like what 😂😂😂. Seriously I have never seen such a lazy terrain transition and that is coming from someone that used to play racing and city games that are from the 2000s.

3. Battery drainage is incredible with this game, I have never played an oculus game that is so quick to drain my quest 2. I believe it takes about an hour for this game to drain your quest 2

4. The story is really just 1 hour, at one point you will forget about side quests, unless your a mindless robot you will absolutely just keep going until the BIGGEST PLOT TWIST IN GAMING HISTORY the developer basically says you got to increase your resistance progression to 50% so you can continue to the final mission lmfao, their goes my refund for this sorry excuse game

5. The final boss no joke... Is a cube 😂😂😂. No I am serious, you thought I was joking I will literally make a YouTube channel and show you. Out of everything this game showcased, this is beyond rediculus I would admit that a story based Roblox game about someone being bullied is Way more satisfying as a story to this epic disappointing game lmfao

6. The only true reason I bought this game is so I could play a open world game, fight giant robots, and to some extent swing like a spider boy, other than that everything else is a joke, I wished this game released sooner because I would Have definitely gave it a higher review

7. I beat and bought this game on the day I gave it a review, also here is some famous lines by the character you play:

I am going after that company because it stole my friend

I want a day off

Ahhhhhhhhhhhh

Yes these are the only things I can remember out of the bunches, mainly more concerned about friend or whatever

Honestly I will just make my story when my phone battery is charged, and write that in the review.

In all, this game is terrible but what other game is not terrible on this platform, I don't believe I will get a refund simply because this game is what I wanted it for... everything else is like over layered cake but whatever I guess

Thank you developer for making a stupid game that I won't refund probably

reviews.review_title: Changed to 1 star because the response.
reviews.review_description:
Completed in about an hour. Not worth £15..... how is it not possible? 22  main story missions taking around 3 mins or so each? Not sure how thats not possible. You only need 50% resistance to do the last battle. Didn't have all upgrades as wasn't needed.
66 mins wow 6 mins over an hour you absolute idiot. Dont worry the video is now uploading to YouTube so everyone will see the proof. Also now everyone can see what a pathetic game developer you are I now hope everyone see what you are like and avoids your game altogether. Ill also be including these screen shots in my video.  And I suppose you are correct that not all missions take around 3 minutes as some are shorter. So using your own logic i could say that 22 missions at the speed of the shortest mission (1minute 30 seconds) takes the game downtrodden minutes.thats using your ridiculous logic.As I said you only need 50% rep to finish the game the other pois was not needed at all. So its your own pathetic development team you should be thanking for that. You have just told everyone I was correct so not sure why you are even responding. And just so we are clear thebinarymill.com will never get another penny off of me you pathetic fools.

developer_response.body: That's literally not possible...did you find an exploit we're not aware of? Edit: So by your own math even if each were an average of 3mins (which they're not I assure you) you're already at 66mins and you haven't touched the side POIs of which you need at least 50% of. So yeah, not possible :)

reviews.review_description: Be warned. I NEVER get motion sick. In cars, rollercoasters, boats, any other VR games, never. Somehow this managed to make me SO SICK. It’s so fun that I brave the sickness until I physically can’t play anymore.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. We're always looking to make a Resist the most comfortable game we possibly can. Have you explored the game's many different control methods and comfort options? Additionally, we'll be releasing an update shortly that introduces even more ways to play so be on the lookout for that.

reviews.review_description: This game has all the elements you need for an amazing game. Difficulty, points system.  Upgrades  all while swinging through the city! Would recommend a open area to play in I found my self close a couple of times to hitting objects lol. Go and try this game!!!

developer_response.body: Great to hear! Thanks for the review :)

reviews.review_title: AMAZING!!!! ONE OF MY BEST VR EXPERIENCE
reviews.review_description:
The momentum is unmatched, and very rewarding once you get the hang of it.

The gameplay is simple & fun.

Graphic is super nice.

Voice acting is charming & dialog is funny. 

100/10

Such an awesome use of VR. Swinging around the city is a blast! The game starts off at a good pace so you can practice the controls. Doesn't take long to start swinging around like Spider-Man. The campaign and voice acting is great too. Definitely a must have...especially for the price.

developer_response.body: Appreciate the review! Great to hear you're enjoying it!

reviews.review_description: I’ve been sending complaints about the installing problem as well as the updates when it comes to games

developer_response.body: Hi, sorry to hear you're having trouble installing the game, but unfortunately we have no control over the downloading or installation process. All we can suggest is you keep reaching out to Oculus support.

reviews.review_description: This game just blew me away
This game is nuts - high quality, amazing gameplay for just $20?! I can’t believe how fun it is
I don't recommend playing this if you get motion sick easily but holy heck did this help me get over my fear of heights

Amazing game, mechanics do take a minute to get a hold of for the jet pack and swinging manoeuvres, but once you do it is so fun and rewarding. Interesting story and satisfying length, a couple crashes did occur but the frequent auto-saving mechanic saved me from losing too much time.
You haven't lived until you take a 90 degree turn at full speed in an office chair!!!
Love the game, so much fun but has anyone else ran into a issue where you go to hack a bill board but their isn’t enough wires.

developer_response.body: Glad to hear you're enjoying the game! As for the billboard hacks, there are always exactly the right amount of wires needed to solve the puzzle, but you might have to think creatively. If you still need some guidance you can always ask for help on our discord https://thebinarymill.com/discord

reviews.review_description: this was one of the first games i bought on oculus and i definitely recommend it.  the storyline and characters are amazing and don’t get me started on the graphics.  I played for hours!
Thank you💯🙏🏼🔥

I bought my quest 2 and immediately thought "this would be cool for a web slinging game" and lo and behold, Resist had done it! They've created a bizarre mashup of Max Payne, GTA, Spiderman and Half Life. Plus, with the variety of control options, just about anyone can find a way to swing through the city. Time dilation, quick turns, and the jet pack make for some really fun, acrobatic, mid air battles. Furthermore, the city itself is packed with enough variety of size in the buildings and the gaps between them that hours of fun can be had just finding new routes and trying not to hit anything.

Honestly, I'm stoked for a sequel or dlc.  The main game only takes a couple hours to complete and a the bulk of playtime is spent on somewhat repetitive mini games. Pedestrians and cars can't be interacted with and enemies pretty much boil down to drones, walkers, and tripods, plus laser polygons in their version of the matrix. There are certain missions where you have to grapple faulty drones and it would be nice to be able to use that mechanic to defeat active drones. Billboard hacking and tower activation are fun but they seem to be padding playtime more than anything. Also, there are only 2 types of guns and the auto pistols are good enough to just keep them equipped. Much the same way the Just Cause series fleshed out their cool mechanics in the sequel, I think this game could turn into a big name in it's next iteration.

That being said, this game gave me exactly what I wanted and more. I wanted to swing through a city with all the vertigo that entails and Binary Mill said "why not shoot some stuff and piss off the cops while you do it?" For that, I thank them. Thank you Binary Mill. Your game was well worth the 20 bucks and time spent writing this.

The swinging and jumping mechanics alone make this game so fun - I could fly around the city all day! 

A bit of feedback I would offer the developers is that if the civilian NPCs were human, rather than drone-like, and interactive, this would dramatically improve the immersion.
The game is alot of fun the grapple feels amazing and rhe story isn't insane but its okay shooting also feels very good and fun i will say make a dlc where i kill crypto
The game is fun and the controls are incredible but you never get to actually see characters ingame! Their are some male and female silhouette people walking around but no actual decent characters

This game is a great deal for the price. It stands miles above a lot of the other shovelware that costs the same. There are a couple of shortcoming but neither of them ruin the experience. 

Shortcomings:
-From all the fast motion Vr games I’ve played, this is the only one to give me motion sickness and it boils down to 1 thing; you accelerate and move unnaturally fast. If this game had the same controls as Swarm, this would be a near perfect game.
-This game goes in too many directions. Instead of being really good at just a few things, it plays like a borderline mini-game-collection. I wish they would have spent more time developing the movement and core concept behind an open world Spider-Man style shooter and less time adding mini-games like ‘jump through the rings’ or ‘jump from building to building’.

reviews.review_title: Best VR game I’ve played yet.
reviews.review_description: Not gonna lie, this definitely makes me want a Spider-Man VR game now.
